summary: Iteration 121: Tested dynamic notifications system. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All features working - mobile bottom nav has Notifiche (no Sfide), filter tabs work, severity badges display, notification click navigation works.

issues: Severity badges (Critica/Importante/Positiva) only show on unread notifications - this is by design per code review

critical_code_review_comments: notification_engine.py: Well-structured with anti-spam (MAX_SIMILAR_PER_HOUR=3, GROUP_WINDOW_MINUTES=30) and narrative templates
routes/notifications.py: Popup endpoint correctly marks shown_popup=True after retrieval to prevent duplicate popups
App.js: Popup polling interval is 15 seconds, auto-dismiss after 6 seconds - good UX balance
NotificationsPage.jsx: Filter tabs and severity badges implemented correctly with proper color coding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic notifications system fully implemented. Backend notification_engine.py generates narrative-style notifications with severity levels (critical/important/positive). Popup endpoint /api/notifications/popup returns unread notifications not yet shown as popup. Mobile bottom nav has Notifiche button (Sfide removed). NotificationsPage has filter tabs for severity filtering.

backend: GET /api/notifications - returns notifications with severity field
GET /api/notifications/popup - returns unread notifications not shown as popup, marks them shown_popup=True
Authentication required for all notification endpoints
frontend: Mobile bottom nav has Notifiche button with bell icon (Sfide button removed)
Notification badge shows unread count on bottom nav
Notifications page loads with filter tabs: Tutte, Critiche, Importanti, Positive
Filter tabs correctly filter notifications by severity
Notifications have colored left border based on severity (red=critical, yellow=important, green=positive)
Notifications have appropriate icons based on type
Clicking notification navigates to correct page (e.g., /films for high_revenue)
